params.name: category
params.description: Category or comma-separated list of categories. Use `Any` to draw from all categories.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

params.name: lang
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the joke language. Supported jokes languages include `en`, `de`, `cs`, `es`, `fr`, `pt`. Defaults to `en`.

params.name: blacklistFlags
params.description: Comma-separated list of flags to exclude (`nsfw`, `religious`, `political`, `racist`, `sexist`, `explicit`). Any joke carrying at least one listed flag is filtered out.

params.name: type
params.description: Restrict results to a single joke type.

params.name: contains
params.description: URL-encoded substring that must appear in the joke text (or the setup/delivery of a twopart joke).

params.name: idRange
params.description: Inclusive ID range (e.g. `0-50`) or a single ID (e.g. `42`) to constrain results.

params.name: amount
params.description: Number of jokes to retrieve (1-10). Defaults to 1.

params.name: safe-mode
params.description: When present (no value required), exclude any joke that carries any flag and any joke categorised as Dark.

items.docs: Retrieve one or more jokes from a single category, a comma-separated list of categories, or the special value `Any`. Supports filtering by blacklist flags, joke type, language, ID range, contains-text search, amount, and safe-mode.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

params.name: dry-run
params.description: When present, the submission is validated for shape but not persisted. No value is required.

items.docs: Submit a joke for moderator review. Submissions are rate-limited separately at 5 per minute per IP. Pass `?dry-run` to validate the payload structure without persisting the submission.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

params.name: lang
params.description: ISO 639-1 system language for the response messages.

items.docs: List every joke category JokeAPI exposes, plus the recognised category aliases. Use one of the returned categories as the path parameter to `/joke/{category}`.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

items.docs: List the blacklist flags consumers can pass to `?blacklistFlags`. Each flag indicates a category of potentially offensive content.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

items.docs: List the response formats JokeAPI can return. Values map to the `?format` query parameter on every other endpoint.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

params.name: lang
params.description: ISO 639-1 system language for the response messages.

items.docs: List the joke languages and the system languages JokeAPI supports. Joke languages have at least one joke available; system languages affect error-message localisation.

params.name: language
params.description: Human-readable language name in English.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

items.docs: Resolve a human-readable language name (e.g. `german`) to its ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. `de`).

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

params.name: lang
params.description: ISO 639-1 system language for the response messages.

items.docs: Return runtime metadata about JokeAPI — version, total joke count, the full list of categories, flags, types, supported formats, language counts, per-language ID ranges, and per-language safe-joke counts.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

items.docs: List every documented endpoint exposed by JokeAPI, including its URL, usage notes, and supported response formats.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Defaults to `json`.

items.docs: Lightweight uptime endpoint. Returns a short payload confirming the API is reachable and reporting the server timestamp.
